features: Scenario Dashboard (Timeline, Monthly Checklist, Action Buttons)
AI Financial Coach (Stern, Encouraging, Analytical tones, local cache)
Draggable Floating AI Button & Bottom Sheet

patterns: Offline-first local cache for heavy API features
gotchas: RenderFlex overflow with BottomSheet needs isScrollControlled: true & ConstrainedBox/SingleChildScrollView
AppBar title constraints need centerTitle: false, titleSpacing: 0 when both leading and actions are present
Supabase auth state stream onAuthStateChange can override local guest session with null if not filtered with local guest fallback
Local notification show/zonedSchedule must use named parameters due to library API updates
conventions: AppColors and AppSizes for UI constraints
Strictly NO ADS on Home, Profile, and Settings screens. Ads must check isPremiumUserProvider before showing.
AI features must check and use local cached responses to save API costs
